project_en: The Ramp That Kept Lying to Him — a Skate Park Energy Audit
project_ar: المنحدر الذي ظلّ يكذب عليه — تدقيق طاقة في حديقة التزلج
persona: Faris — building a plywood launch ramp to clear a gap
phet_sim: Energy Skate Park (phet.colorado.edu) — energy bar chart on
ending_hint: Diegetic callback to the concept-spark videos (book on the shelf, the cart, the pendulum) — the hint IS the last movement of the story.
tone: Silence is content. Kitchen-table-warm. A story we watch, not a lecture. Pure #000000 void, font=sans. English voice, فصحى Arabic subtitles.

beats.text: Faris built a ramp out of plywood. A launch on one side, a gap, a landing on the other.
beats.text_ar: بنى فارس منحدرًا من ألواح الخشب. منصّةُ انطلاقٍ في جهة، وفجوة، ومهبطٌ في الجهة الأخرى.
beats.visual: Side view, pure void. A simple plywood launch ramp left, a gap, a lower landing ramp right. Faris a minimal figure beside it.

beats.text: One goal. Clear the gap. Land clean on the far side.
beats.text_ar: هدفٌ واحد. اجتيازُ الفجوة. وهبوطٌ نظيفٌ على الجهة المقابلة.
beats.visual: A dotted ideal arc drawn from launch lip to landing. Calm, single line.

beats.text: He starts low. He doesn't make it. He falls into the gap.
beats.text_ar: يبدأ من ارتفاعٍ منخفض. لا يصل. يسقط في الفجوة.
beats.visual: Low start point on the ramp; the board's arc falls short into the gap. A small, quiet fail.

beats.text: So he builds the launch higher. Now he overshoots — flies past the landing, and crashes.
beats.text_ar: فيرفع منصّة الانطلاق. الآن يتجاوز الهدف — يطير بعيدًا عن المهبط، ويرتطم.
beats.visual: Start point raised; arc now overshoots far past the landing ramp.

beats.text: He lowers it a little. Short again.
beats.text_ar: يخفضه قليلًا. قصيرٌ من جديد.
beats.visual: Start lowered a notch; arc falls just short. The trial-and-error loop is forming.

beats.text: He decides the wood is the problem. He sands it smooth. He waxes it.
beats.text_ar: يقرّر أنّ الخشب هو المشكلة. يصقله حتى يَنعَم. ويطليه بالشمع.
beats.visual: Close on the ramp surface going from rough texture to smooth, glinting.

beats.text: Same height as before. But now he flies further — and overshoots again. The same ramp gave him two different answers.
beats.text_ar: الارتفاع نفسه كما كان. لكنّه الآن يطير أبعد — ويتجاوز الهدف ثانية. المنحدر نفسه أعطاه إجابتين مختلفتين.
beats.visual: Two overlaid arcs from the SAME start height: yesterday's shorter (rough), today's longer (waxed). A faint question mark between them.

beats.text: He raises, lowers, sands, guesses. He is almost out of plywood, and out of patience.
beats.text_ar: يرفع، ويخفض، ويصقل، ويُخمّن. كاد ينفد منه الخشب، ونفد منه الصبر.
beats.visual: Quick montage of start-height markers jittering up and down; a dwindling stack of plywood.

beats.text: The ramp keeps lying to him. Same setup, different result. He can't see the rule underneath.
beats.text_ar: يظلّ المنحدر يكذب عليه. الإعدادُ نفسه، والنتيجةُ مختلفة. لا يرى القاعدة الكامنة تحته.
beats.visual: Faris sitting beside the ramp, still. The two contradicting arcs hang faintly above him. A held, quiet beat.

beats.text: But he was never short of wood. He was short of a model.
beats.text_ar: لكنّه لم يكن ينقصه الخشب قط. كان ينقصه نموذج.
beats.visual: The plywood stack fades. The word-free idea: the arcs remain, waiting to be explained.

beats.text: Every failed run was energy he didn't count. The height he started from — that became his speed at the bottom.
beats.text_ar: كلُّ محاولةٍ فاشلةٍ كانت طاقةً لم يحسبها. الارتفاعُ الذي انطلق منه — تحوّل إلى سرعته في الأسفل.
beats.visual: Start height shown as a tall 'stored' bar; as the board descends, that bar pours into a 'speed' bar at the ramp bottom.

beats.text: And the rough wood quietly ate some of it — turned it into heat. Wax the ramp, less is eaten, he goes further.
beats.text_ar: والخشبُ الخشنُ كان يلتهم جزءًا منها بهدوء — يحوّله إلى حرارة. وحين يُطلى بالشمع، يُلتهَمُ أقلّ، فيقطعُ مسافةً أبعد.
beats.visual: Same pour, but a thin stream siphons off into a faint 'heat' shimmer at the rough surface; on the waxed surface that stream is much thinner.

beats.text: Same height, two answers — because friction was a term he never wrote down.
beats.text_ar: الارتفاعُ نفسه، وإجابتان — لأنّ الاحتكاك كان حدًّا لم يدوّنه قط.
beats.visual: The two arcs return, now each tagged with its heat-loss size. The mystery resolves into a missing term.

beats.text: So before he touches the real ramp again — he tests it somewhere he can see the energy.
beats.text_ar: لذا، قبل أن يلمس المنحدر الحقيقي مجددًا — يختبره في مكانٍ يرى فيه الطاقة.
beats.visual: The scene resolves into the Energy Skate Park layout: a track shaped like his ramp, and a stacked energy bar-chart panel.

beats.text: Energy Skate Park. He builds his ramp's shape into the track. Turns the energy bars on.
beats.text_ar: محاكاة «حديقة التزلج». يبني شكل منحدره داخل المسار. ويُشغّل أعمدة الطاقة.
beats.visual: The PhET track taking his ramp's profile; the bar chart (potential / kinetic / thermal / total) appears beside it.

beats.text: Here is the real job. Not pressing play. Predicting — before he does.
beats.text_ar: هنا تكمن المهمّةُ الحقيقيّة. ليست الضغط على التشغيل. بل التنبّؤ — قبل أن يفعل.
beats.visual: A finger hovering over a play button, deliberately not pressing. The bars sit at their start state.

beats.text: How fast at the bottom. How high on the far side. Worked out from the energy — start height, minus what friction takes.
beats.text_ar: ما سرعتُه في الأسفل. وما ارتفاعُه في الجهة المقابلة. محسوبًا من الطاقة — ارتفاعُ البداية، ناقصًا ما يأخذه الاحتكاك.
beats.visual: Three blanks to fill before the run: v_bottom = ?, h_far = ?, with a small 'PE − heat → KE' relation sketched, numbers left open.

beats.text: Then he presses play. And he watches the bars, not the skater.
beats.text_ar: ثمّ يضغط على التشغيل. ويراقب الأعمدة، لا المتزلّج.
beats.visual: The skater runs; camera stays on the bar chart — potential shrinking, kinetic rising, thermal creeping up, total flat.

beats.text: After — he explains the gap. If he said this and the bars said that: which lever did he misjudge? The height? The friction?
beats.text_ar: بعد ذلك — يفسّر الفجوة. إن قال هذا وقالت الأعمدةُ ذاك: أيُّ عاملٍ أساء تقديره؟ الارتفاع؟ أم الاحتكاك؟
beats.visual: His prediction and the sim's result side by side; the difference highlighted, two suspects labeled 'height' and 'friction'.

beats.text: He adjusts the friction. Predicts again. Three runs. That's all he gets.
beats.text_ar: يضبط الاحتكاك. ويتنبّأ مجددًا. ثلاث محاولات. هذا كلّ ما لديه.
beats.visual: A friction slider nudged; '3 runs' counter. No random clicking — each run deliberate.

beats.text: His first prediction is wrong. That is not the problem. That is the point. Each miss tells him which energy he forgot.
beats.text_ar: تنبّؤه الأول خاطئ. ليست تلك هي المشكلة. تلك هي الغاية. كلُّ إخفاقٍ يخبره أيَّ طاقةٍ نسي.
beats.visual: Run 1 miss, run 2 closer, run 3 close — the prediction line converging onto the sim's bars.

beats.text: Now he builds the real ramp. Once. And the landing is clean.
beats.text_ar: الآن يبني المنحدر الحقيقي. مرّةً واحدة. ويأتي الهبوطُ نظيفًا.
beats.visual: Back to the plywood scene. One start height, set with intent. The board arcs and lands clean on the far ramp.

beats.text: The clean landing was never the homework. This is: in one sentence, your own words — why did the same ramp give two answers, and which energy did he keep forgetting?
beats.text_ar: لم يكن الهبوطُ النظيف هو الواجب قط. الواجبُ هو هذا: في جملةٍ واحدةٍ، بكلماتك أنت — لماذا أعطى المنحدرُ نفسُه إجابتين، وأيَّ طاقةٍ ظلّ ينساها؟
beats.visual: The ramp holds, still. An empty line waits for the student's own sentence. Silence.

beats.text: And if all of this felt familiar — it should. Do you remember the book that sat still on the shelf, holding energy it hadn't spent? The cart that turned a push into speed? The pendulum that never lost a thing — until something quietly took it?
beats.text_ar: وإن بدا لك كلُّ هذا مألوفًا — فحُقَّ له. أتذكرُ الكتابَ الذي استقرَّ ساكنًا على الرفّ، يحملُ طاقةً لم يُنفقها؟ والعربةَ التي حوّلت دفعةً إلى سرعة؟ والبندولَ الذي لم يفقد شيئًا قط — حتى أخذ منه شيءٌ ما بهدوء؟
beats.visual: Three faint callbacks flicker in the void in turn: the book on a shelf, the rolling cart, the swinging pendulum — the exact images from those concept videos.

beats.text: This ramp was all of them, at once. That is the concept. Now you know which videos to go back to.
beats.text_ar: كان هذا المنحدرُ كلَّها، في آنٍ واحد. تلك هي الفكرة. الآن تعرفُ إلى أيِّ مقاطعَ تعود.
beats.visual: The three callback images converge into the single ramp+energy-bar image, then hold. The hint, complete. Stillness. [Hold 3s in silence]
